title: Tracy Geaccone
compiled_truth: Tracy Geaccone is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-21 to 2004-02-04), Tracy Geaccone sent 683 and received 1174 emails, totalling 1857 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (139), [John Keiser](people/john-keiser) (53), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (50), [Mary Botello](people/mary-botello) (48), [Jan Moore](people/jan-moore) (46).
